creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
> Perhaps the build-outputs.mk file needs to be conditionalized
> somehow? The version in files/ is different than the one in
> the upstream dist now, in case that matters.

I haven't looked deep into Lev's build-outputs.mk hack but this
file is copied only to $WRKSRC if SVN_BUILD_BINDINGS is defined.

ports which define SVN_BUILD_BINDINGS
- devel/p5-subversion/
- devel/py-subversion
- devel/ruby-subversion
- java/subversion-java

Maybe Lev can explain with a view words the build-outputs.mk
changes or document those in the subversion Makefile so we can
take care about this hacks in our next PR's ;)


--
Regards,
olli
